meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Ship SaaS Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your startup. Learn how to master AI-driven debugging using Antigravity and Claude Code to overcome unfinished projects and reach launch day.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' syndrome is usually a technical debt bottleneck. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for rapid CLI-based debugging, you transform stalled features into shippable code. Stop manually tracing bugs; leverage AI agentic workflows to automate root-cause analysis and accelerate your time-to-market.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is littered with 'almost-finished' MVPs. You started with a vision, built the core logic, and then hit the wall: a cascade of obscure bugs that turned your momentum into a slog. Every day spent debugging a legacy feature is a day your competition captures your market share.

But the paradigm has shifted. You are no longer a lone coder fighting syntax; you are an architect orchestrating AI agents to dismantle technical roadblocks. By leveraging specialized debugging tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can turn your bottleneck into a bridge, shipping the features that actually generate revenue.

steps.title: Isolate the Architectural Bottleneck
steps.description: Before fixing code, identify if the bug is a symptom of poor architecture. Use AI to map out the dependency graph causing the friction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and identify the specific module causing the highest frequency of runtime errors during user authentication flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ls --include-patterns 'src/auth/*.ts' && claude ask 'Why is this authentication flow failing under high load?'

steps.title: Automated Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Stop debugging by trial and error. Generate robust test suites to catch edge cases before they hit production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a comprehensive Jest test suite for the payment processing module that covers all edge cases including 4xx and 5xx API responses.

steps.title: Root Cause Traceability
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace the execution path of the error back to the origin, cutting through the noise of stack traces.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Trace the execution path of the current runtime error in the checkout service. Identify the exact line of code where the state mutation becomes invalid.
steps.claude_code_command: claude debug --trace 'checkout_service.js' --error 'TypeError: Cannot read property of undefined'

steps.title: Refactoring for Maintainability
steps.description: Apply AI-driven refactoring to simplify complex logic that is prone to breaking, ensuring your code remains scalable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current complex conditional logic in the dashboard controller into a clean, modular service pattern that is easier to debug.

steps.title: Validation and Deployment
steps.description: Finalize your fix with automated verification, ensuring the solution doesn't introduce regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the recent refactor for potential regressions and verify it satisfies all business requirements defined in the PRD.

pro_tips: Always define your 'Success State' in the prompt; AI debuggers perform 3x better when they know what the code is supposed to do, not just what it is doing wrong.
Use Claude Code's CLI to ignore auto-generated build files (like dist or node_modules) to keep the AI's context window focused on your business logic.
When debugging, ask the AI to explain the 'Why' behind a bug, not just the 'Fix'. This builds your internal knowledge base as a founder.
Chain your prompts: Have Antigravity propose the architecture, and use Claude Code to execute the implementation to maintain consistency across the stack.
Treat your AI as a Senior Engineer: If the output feels 'junior' or verbose, explicitly prompt it to 'optimize for production-grade, concise code'.
content.next_steps: Now that you have debugged your core feature, integrate a CI/CD pipeline to automate your testing cycle so these bugs never return to your production environment.
content.conversion_block: Don't let technical friction kill your business dreams. Arm yourself with the tools that professional AI engineers use to ship at velocity. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
